log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Deep Gnome — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):18+6=24 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Deep Gnome — Armored Escapist: FAIL! 30 cold damage + .

Archmage is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Archmage WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:18+6=24 vs DC 15] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
